title: [TaCZ1.1.5+Arcana]Originium Weapons
description: This is an expansion pack based on an alternate-universe crossover between Arknights and Metal Gear.
body:
![源石武器包封面](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df2b0d9a4169bb0e2109dacea85b9b8bcf32b5a0_0.webp)

# **源石武器包**
- **本枪包只适用于“永恒枪械工坊：零"**
- **本枪包需要额外附属mod【TacZ:arcana】:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tacz-arcana-timeless-and-classics-guns**
# **Originium Weapons**
- **This gun pack is only compatible with "Timeless and Classics: Zero" (TaCZ).**
- **This gun pack requires an additional addon mod [TacZ:arcana]: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tacz-arcana-timeless-and-classics-guns**
## 【枪械包介绍】：
- 枪包故事背景建立在《明日方舟》世界观《合金装备》科技框架下。

- 架空武器取材参考时间范围在2000-2020年代左右

- 外界对于这起事件来说，这只是一起海上平台爆炸事故，这对于“世外天堂”而言，这是“原爆点”事件，这是他们的一个“幻痛”。

- 也正因为这起事件，这片大地获得了大量来自【另外一边】的科技，原本造价高昂的源石子弹，在【另外一边】的帮助下通过逆向开发，使源石子弹的造价大幅度降低且威力能达到“火药子弹”的90%。

## 【Gun Pack Introduction】:
- The story background of this gun pack is set within the Arknights universe, under the technological framework of Metal Gear.

- The fictional weapons are mainly inspired by real-world equipment from the 2000s–2020s period.

- To the outside world, this was just an offshore platform explosion. But for "Outer Heaven", this was the "Ground Zeroes" incident – their "Phantom Pain".

- Because of this incident, Terra gained a large amount of technology from "the other side". Originally expensive Originium rounds, through reverse engineering assisted by "the other side", saw a dramatic reduction in manufacturing cost while retaining 90% of the power of conventional gunpowder rounds.

## 【如何安装】：
安装1.1.4+版本的tacz模组并启动一次游戏，打开你的游戏目录，找到根目录的tacz文件夹，将整个压缩包扔进去（不需要解压），然后重新启动游戏即可。

## 【How to Install】:
Install TaCZ version 1.1.4 or later and run the game at least once. Open your game directory, locate the tacz folder in the root directory. Drop the entire compressed pack (do not extract it) into that folder, then restart the game.

## 【如何使用】：
你可以直接从创造模式栏获取内容。对于生存模式，你先要合成一个武器合成台，并在里面制作武器和配件。

## 【How to Use】:
You can directly take the items from the Creative Mode inventory. For Survival Mode, you must first craft a Weapon Workbench, then use it to craft weapons and attachments.

## 【其他事项】：
枪包还处于开发阶段，由于作者没有国际主流社交平台账号，所以如果需要反馈在这里反馈即可。

## 【Additional Notes】:
This gun pack is still under development. The author does not have any major international social media accounts, so if you need to provide feedback, please do so here.
